watched.title: Law Abiding Citizen
watched.overview: A frustrated man decides to take justice into his own hands after a plea bargain sets one of his family's killers free. He targets not only the killer but also the district attorney and others involved in the deal.

watched.title: The Hunger Games
watched.overview: In a dystopian society where the Capitol forces each district to send two young tributes to fight to the death in a televised spectacle, a girl volunteers to take her sister’s place, setting the stage for a struggle of survival and defiance.

watched.title: Joy
watched.overview: A story based on the life of a struggling Long Island single mom who became one of the country's most successful entrepreneurs.
watched.review:
---


![[joy.jpeg]]

Фильм о невероятно доброй девушке, которая несмотря на все трудности преследовала свою цель, не забывая о морали и чести. Даже в самые сложные моменты, она помогала своим близким, хотя те не поддерживали героиню в трудную минуту, а наоборот -- мешали и говорили, что ничего не выйдет. Очевидно, они были неправы.  Все вокруг пытались ей навредить, кто-то случайно, а кто-то специально.
Джой, главная героиня, -- невероятная изобретательница. Ее невозможно остановить, она всегда идет вперед и в итоге добивается успеха. Получив известность, она продолжает помогать таким же изобретателям решать те проблемы, которые преследовали ее на пути. Джой полностью открыта миру и излучает только добро.

---

watched.title: Moneyball
watched.overview: The story of Oakland Athletics general manager Billy Beane's successful attempt to put together a baseball team on a budget, by employing computer-generated analysis to draft his players.
watched.review:
---
"Человек, изменивший всё" — фильм, основанный на реальных событиях, про статистику и математику в игре бейсбол.

Бейсбольный клуб, имеющий скудное финансирование, нуждается в новшествах при наборе игроков. Без денег, по-другому им никак не достичь высот. 

Менеджер клуба находит молодого парня, который производит оценку игроков основываясь исключительно на статистике. Он находит спортсменов, имеющих хорошие показатели в нужных областях, но при этом сильно недооценённых при привычных методах набора команды. Вместе, они набирают таких людей, закрывая разные позиции. 

Никто не верит в эту систему, герои терпят много неудач. В основном, из-за ошибок тренера, который ведёт игру "по-старому". Так проигрывается игра за игрой. 
Но решая все трудности, получается поставить невероятный рекорд и выйти в финал. 

Герои мечтают и верят, что можно изменить положение дел. Доказать, что команды без большого финансирования, также могут достигать побед. Раньше это считалось невозможным, но у них действительно получилось.

watchlist.title: Ted Lasso
watchlist.overview: Ted Lasso, an American football coach, moves to England when he's hired to manage a soccer team—despite having no experience. With cynical players and a doubtful town, will he get them to see the Ted Lasso Way?

watchlist.title: Dumb Money
watchlist.overview: Vlogger Keith Gill sinks his life savings into GameStop stock and posts about it. When social media starts blowing up, so do his life and the lives of everyone following him. As a stock tip becomes a movement, everyone gets rich—until the billionaires fight back, and both sides find their worlds turned upside down.

watchlist.title: Into the Wild
watchlist.overview: After graduating from Emory University in 1992, top student and athlete Christopher McCandless abandons his possessions, gives his entire $24,000 savings account to charity, and hitchhikes to Alaska to live in the wilderness.

watchlist.title: The Menu
watchlist.overview: A young couple travels to a remote island to eat at an exclusive restaurant where the chef has prepared a lavish menu, with some shocking surprises.

watchlist.title: The Social Dilemma
watchlist.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: Raj is a rich, carefree, happy-go-lucky second generation NRI. Simran is the daughter of Chaudhary Baldev Singh, who in spite of being an NRI is very strict about adherence to Indian values. Simran has left for India to be married to her childhood fiancé. Raj leaves for India with a mission at his hands, to claim his lady love under the noses of her whole family. Thus begins a saga.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: Raj is a rich, carefree, happy-go-lucky second generation NRI. The Comedy and Drama angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Parasite
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: All unemployed, Ki-taek's family takes peculiar interest in the wealthy and glamorous Parks for their livelihood until they get entangled in an unexpected incident.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: All unemployed, Ki-taek's family takes peculiar interest in the wealthy and glamorous Parks for their livelihood until they get entangled in an unexpected incident. The Comedy and Drama angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Forrest Gump
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: A man with a low IQ has accomplished great things in his life and been present during significant historic events—in each case, far exceeding what anyone imagined he could do. But despite all he has achieved, his one true love eludes him.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A man with a low IQ has accomplished great things in his life and been present during significant historic events—in each case, far exceeding what anyone imagined he could do. The Comedy and Drama angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Life Is Beautiful
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: A touching story of an Italian book seller of Jewish ancestry who lives in his own little fairy tale. His creative and happy life would come to an abrupt halt when his entire family is deported to a concentration camp during World War II. While locked up he tries to convince his son that the whole thing is just a game.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A touching story of an Italian book seller of Jewish ancestry who lives in his own little fairy tale. The Comedy and Drama angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: A Dog's Will
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: The lively João Grilo and the sly Chicó are poor guys living in the hinterland who cheat a bunch of people in a small town in Northeastern Brazil. When they die, they have to be judged by Christ, the Devil and the Virgin Mary before they are admitted to paradise.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: The lively João Grilo and the sly Chicó are poor guys living in the hinterland who cheat a bunch of people in a small town in Northeastern Brazil. The Comedy and Drama angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Pulp Fiction
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: A burger-loving hit man, his philosophical partner, a drug-addled gangster's moll and a washed-up boxer converge in this sprawling, comedic crime caper. Their adventures unfurl in three stories that ingeniously trip back and forth in time.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A burger-loving hit man, his philosophical partner, a drug-addled gangster's moll and a washed-up boxer converge in this sprawling, comedic crime caper. The Comedy and Crime angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: The Shawshank Redemption
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: Imprisoned in the 1940s for the double murder of his wife and her lover, upstanding banker Andy Dufresne begins a new life at the Shawshank prison, where he puts his accounting skills to work for an amoral warden. During his long stretch in prison, Dufresne comes to be admired by the other inmates -- including an older prisoner named Red -- for his integrity and unquenchable sense of hope.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: Imprisoned in the 1940s for the double murder of his wife and her lover, upstanding banker Andy Dufresne begins a new life at the Shawshank prison, where he puts his accounting... The Drama and Crime angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: The Godfather
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: Spanning the years 1945 to 1955, a chronicle of the fictional Italian-American Corleone crime family. When organized crime family patriarch, Vito Corleone barely survives an attempt on his life, his youngest son, Michael steps in to take care of the would-be killers, launching a campaign of bloody revenge.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: Spanning the years 1945 to 1955, a chronicle of the fictional Italian-American Corleone crime family. The Drama and Crime angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: The Godfather Part II
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: In the continuing saga of the Corleone crime family, a young Vito Corleone grows up in Sicily and in 1910s New York. In the 1950s, Michael Corleone attempts to expand the family business into Las Vegas, Hollywood and Cuba.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: In the continuing saga of the Corleone crime family, a young Vito Corleone grows up in Sicily and in 1910s New York. The Drama and Crime angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: The Green Mile
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: A supernatural tale set on death row in a Southern prison, where gentle giant John Coffey possesses the mysterious power to heal people's ailments. When the cell block's head guard, Paul Edgecomb, recognizes Coffey's miraculous gift, he tries desperately to help stave off the condemned man's execution.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A supernatural tale set on death row in a Southern prison, where gentle giant John Coffey possesses the mysterious power to heal people's ailments. The Drama and Crime angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: GoodFellas
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: The true story of Henry Hill, a half-Irish, half-Sicilian Brooklyn kid who is adopted by neighbourhood gangsters at an early age and climbs the ranks of a Mafia family under the guidance of Jimmy Conway.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: The true story of Henry Hill, a half-Irish, half-Sicilian Brooklyn kid who is adopted by neighbourhood gangsters at an early age and climbs the ranks of a Mafia family under the... The Drama and Crime angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: City of God
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: In the poverty-stricken favelas of Rio de Janeiro in the 1970s, two young men choose different paths. Rocket is a budding photographer who documents the increasing drug-related violence of his neighborhood, while José “Zé” Pequeno is an ambitious drug dealer diving into a dangerous life of crime.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: In the poverty-stricken favelas of Rio de Janeiro in the 1970s, two young men choose different paths. The Drama and Crime angle is the clearest fit.

aiDiscoveries.title: Hidden Figures
aiDiscoveries.overview: The untold story of Katherine G. Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson – brilliant African-American women working at NASA and serving as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history – the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit. The visionary trio crossed all gender and race lines to inspire generations to dream big.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: Determined female mathematicians overcome racial segregation at NASA; the theme of perseverance and breakthrough directly echoes the inventive, morally driven spirit of Joy’s character.

aiDiscoveries.title: The Big Short
aiDiscoveries.overview: The men who made millions from a global economic meltdown.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: Underdog investors use data analysis to expose the 2008 financial crisis; the premise of statistical insight versus entrenched systems mirrors the data‑driven underdog triumph in Moneyball.

aiDiscoveries.title: The Imitation Game
aiDiscoveries.overview: Based on the real life story of legendary cryptanalyst Alan Turing, the film portrays the nail-biting race against time by Turing and his brilliant team of code-breakers at Britain's top-secret Government Code and Cypher School at Bletchley Park, during the darkest days of World War II.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: A persecuted code‑breaker’s breakthrough in WWII cryptography showcases innovation under adversity; the mood of紧张 and eventual triumph parallels the struggle‑and‑success narrative seen in Moneyball.

aiDiscoveries.title: Little Miss Sunshine
aiDiscoveries.overview: A family loaded with quirky, colorful characters piles into an old van and road trips to California for little Olive to compete in a beauty pageant.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: A quirky family road trip centers on an underdog contestant in a beauty pageant; the premise of embracing unconventional paths and finding acceptance recalls the uplifting underdog journeys in Into the Wild and Joy.

aiDiscoveries.title: The Fighter
aiDiscoveries.overview: Boxer "Irish" Micky Ward's unlikely road to the world light welterweight title. His Rocky-like rise was shepherded by half-brother Dicky, a boxer-turned-trainer who rebounded in life after nearly being KO'd by drugs and crime.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: A boxer battles family loyalty and personal ambition for a championship; the theme of familial pressure and relentless drive reflects the determination displayed by Joy and the sacrifices in Into the Wild.

aiDiscoveries.title: The Martian
aiDiscoveries.overview: During a manned mission to Mars, Astronaut Mark Watney is presumed dead after a fierce storm and left behind by his crew. But Watney has survived and finds himself stranded and alone on the hostile planet. With only meager supplies, he must draw upon his ingenuity, wit and spirit to subsist and find a way to signal to Earth that he is alive.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: An astronaut uses scientific ingenuity to survive alone on Mars; the premise of resource‑constrained problem solving and an optimistic, resourceful mood aligns with the data‑driven resilience of Moneyball.

aiDiscoveries.title: Captain Phillips
aiDiscoveries.overview: The true story of Captain Richard Phillips and the 2009 hijacking by Somali pirates of the US-flagged MV Maersk Alabama, the first American cargo ship to be hijacked in two hundred years.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: A merchant mariner endures a harrowing hijacking and captivity; the mood of tense survival and the theme of human endurance echo the raw, unforgiving journey depicted in Into the Wild.

aiDiscoveries.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
aiDiscoveries.overview: A struggling salesman takes custody of his son as he's poised to begin a life-changing professional career.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: A father overcomes extreme homelessness while raising his son, embodying relentless optimism; the theme of hope against odds directly mirrors the moral fortitude and perseverance seen in Joy’s story.
